channel.title: Pwa in frontity
channel.description:
Hi, any idea about how we can implement PWA in our project. See below Site URL :https://aaradhanatextile.in/
Thank you

item.title: Pwa in frontity
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @deepak.gupta

Welcome to the Frontity community. Good to see that you’re using Frontity for your project.

BTW your site looks great! Please consider submitting it for inclusion on our showcases page.

The topic of PWAs has come up before in this forum, in particular take a look at this one.

Unfortunately creating a PWA with Frontity isn’t possible at the moment, but it’s a feature that is in the roadmap. Take a look at the feature discussion here.

Read full topic
